queries.question: Provide a list of all screenwriters and also provide a list of playwrights who have studied at New York University.
queries.sql:
SELECT Writer.name 
FROM Writer
WHERE Writer.Type = "Screenwriter" OR Writer.Type = "Playwright" AND Writer.Education = "New York University"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?writer a :Writer .
  ?writer p:name ?name .
  ?writer p:Type ?type_w .
  ?writer p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?writer p:Education ?education_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Screenwriter" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Playwright" && STR(?education_w) = "New York University")))
}

queries.question: Show screenwriters and playwrights who have studied at New York University.
queries.sql:
SELECT Writer.name 
FROM Writer
WHERE (Writer.Type = "Screenwriter" OR Writer.Type = "Playwright") AND Writer.Education = "New York University"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?writer a :Writer .
  ?writer p:name ?name .
  ?writer p:Type ?type_w .
  ?writer p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?writer p:Education ?education_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Screenwriter" || STR(?type_w2) = "Playwright")) && STR(?education_w) = "New York University"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show screenwriters and playwrights who have studied at New York University.
